questions.q: What virus prompted a global contact-tracing effort following an outbreak on the cruise ship MV Hondius in May 2026?
Parents in which country strongly criticized the government's decision to end the 2026 school year a month early to accommodate the FIFA World Cup?
Under President Nasry Asfura, which Central American country announced in May 2026 it is reconsidering restoring diplomatic ties with Taiwan?
In May 2026, a Ukrainian delegation urged the U.S. to investigate the possible use of which technology by Russia's sanctioned 'shadow fleet'?
Following disastrous local elections in May 2026, which Labour MP threatened a leadership challenge against Keir Starmer if no cabinet member stepped forward?
